positive: Minimalist, high-contrast illustration of a stylized lunar landscape viewed through a porthole window, featuring abstract celestial bodies and geometric rock formations. The design should use a restricted palette of deep navy blue, burnt orange, and matte gold leaf accents, giving it a retro-futuristic atomic age feel. The composition must be central and symmetric, featuring clean, thick silhouettes against a slightly gradient, textured background that evokes space depth. Perfect for screen printing on fabric, maintaining sharp lines and solid color areas. Highly detailed, vintage sci-fi poster style, flat vector art aesthetic, clean edges, maximalist composition.
